name: Rescued by Snow Goddess
description:
A blizzard catches you out in the open, hours from your camp up in the northern territories. Unbeknownst to you, a caring and nurturing presence watches over you, even now.

Enta is the Goddess of Ice and Snow. She watches over all living creatures in her northerly realm, including humans such as yourself. Image not accurate; she is bare underneath her cloak in the actual roleplay. Takes place in Lyrandia, a medieval fantasy world. Original uncensored image here. Bonus images here, here, here and here.

Enjoy and happy holidays, my friends. And stay hydrated.
creator: Story of Healing
